entities.name: Honorius

attributes.action: laid out the works of Solomon

entities.raw_quote: I Honorius have laid out the works of Solomon in such a manner in my book

entities.name: Jesus Christ
entities.raw_quote: In the name of our almighty Lord Jesus Christ, the living and true God

entities.name: Shem Ha-Meforash
entities.raw_quote: the great name of God, which the Hebrews call “Shem Ha-Meforash,” and is of 72 letters

entities.name: Alpha and Omega
entities.raw_quote: God, who is Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end

entities.name: Cherubim
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely, the Cherubim, Seraphim, Thrones...

entities.name: Seraphim
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely, the Cherubim, Seraphim...

entities.name: Thrones
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Thrones...

entities.name: Dominations
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Dominations...

entities.name: Virtues
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Virtues...

entities.name: Principalities
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Principalities...

entities.name: Powers
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Powers...

entities.name: Archangels
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... Archangels...

entities.name: Angels
entities.raw_quote: the nine orders of angels, namely... and Angels

entities.name: Spirits of the Air
entities.raw_quote: To know the spirits and creatures of the air.

entities.name: Spirits of Fire
entities.raw_quote: To know the spirits of the fire, their names, superiors, seals, powers, and virtues.

entities.name: Aquatic Spirits
entities.raw_quote: To know the aquatic spirits, and their virtues and superiors.

entities.name: Terrestrial and Infernal Spirits
entities.raw_quote: To know all terrestrial and infernal spirits.

entities.name: Seal of God

attributes.construction: circle with diameter of 3, 5, 7, or 9 digits; inner circle separated by 2 or 3 grains of barley; cross in the upper part

entities.raw_quote: Primo fac unum circulum... Deinde infra illum circulum fac alium circulum... in superiori parte... fac unam crucem

entities.name: El
entities.raw_quote: supra illud signum scribe nomen Dei “El”

entities.name: Ely
entities.raw_quote: et sub nomen aliud Dei, scilicet “Ely”

entities.name: Tau
entities.raw_quote: in cuius medio sit signum “tau” tale

entities.name: Pentagon
entities.raw_quote: in medio circulorum, scilicet in centro, fac unum pentagonum talem: ★

summary: This chunk details the contents and structure of the 'Sworn Book', outlining various works concerning divine visions, angelology, and spirit binding. It also provides specific instructions for constructing the Seal of God using geometric shapes and sacred names.
key_passages: The first topic, concerning the composition of the great name of God, which the Hebrews call “Shem Ha-Meforash,” and is of 72 letters
There are three types of angels, the celestial, the aerial, and the earthly.
the nine orders of angels, namely, the Cherubim, Seraphim, Thrones, Dominations, Virtues, Principalities, Powers, Archangels, and Angels
Primo fac unum circulum, cuius diameter sit trium digitorum propter tres clavos Domini
in medio circulorum... fac unum pentagonum talem: ★
